title: “Deception erodes not only individual trust but also institutional credibility.” What ethical concerns arise from such conduct? What measures can prevent it?
description: Q7. “Deception erodes not only individual trust but also institutional credibility.” What ethical concerns arise from such conduct? What measures can prevent it? (10 M) Difficulty Level: Medium Reference: TH Why the question Increasing instances of misinformation, lack of transparency and ethical lapses in public life have raised concerns about trust deficit in institutions.
